description:
Set the zoom level ('''F'''ield '''O'''f '''V'''iew) of the given camera.
The zoom level is from ''{{hl|0.01}}'' for the nearest and ''{{hl|8.5}}'' for the furthest zoom value, with a default zoom level of ''{{hl|0.75}}''
The angle of the field of view is ''{{hl|atan(FOV)*2}}'' radians when in 4:3 aspect ratio. Needs the call of [[camCommit]] to be conducted.
name: camSetFov

Item.desc: zoom level, range 0.01 to 8.5 (see description above)
Item.name: level
